description_wiki: Nigeria, officially the Federal Republic of Nigeria, is a country in West Africa between the Sahel to the north and the Gulf of Guinea in the Atlantic Ocean to the south.

aliases: Port Harcourt Town, Port Harcourt, Nigeria
description_wiki: Port Harcourt (Nigerian Pidgin: Po-ta-kot or Pi-ta-kwa, former name Igweocha) is a port city,  capital and largest city of Rivers State in Nigeria.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.
